emailTemplate.body:
Dear Valued Client,
This notification confirms that settlement has been completed for the following trade:
Settlement Details: Order ID: ${orderId} Settlement Amount: $${amount} Settlement Date: ${settlementDate}
The funds have been credited/debited to your account as per the standard settlement procedure. Please allow 1-2 business days for the transaction to appear in your account statement.
For questions regarding this settlement or to request a detailed settlement report, please contact:
BigCorp Settlement Operations Phone: 1-800-BIG-CORP ext. 4200 Email: settlements@bigcorp.com
Regards, BigCorp Settlement Operations
--- DISCLAIMER: This is an automated notification from BigCorp Trading Systems. Settlement amounts are subject to final reconciliation. Please refer to your official account statement for confirmed balances. Report any discrepancies within 5 business days.
